title: [Renseikai] Student Classification Column – Event Participant List – Student with Classification Value – Column visible with correct value
description: AC 01.1 — CRUD Testing — Confirms the Student Classification column is present in the Event Participant List and displays the student's classification value when set.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Event Master exists with at least one participant whose Student Classification = 在籍生 (enrolled).
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the Event Master list view"
2. "Click on the Event Master to open its detail page"
3. "Scroll to the Participant List section"
4. "Locate the participant with Student Classification = 在籍生"
5. "Read the Student Classification column value for that participant"
steps_result:
1. "Event Master list view loads"
2. "Event Master detail page opens"
3. "Participant List table is visible"
4. "The row for that participant is visible"
5. "The cell shows 在籍生"

title: [Renseikai] Student Classification Column – Event Participant List – Student with Null Classification – Column displays blank
description: AC 01.1 — Equivalence Partitioning — Confirms the Student Classification column shows a blank cell when a participant has no classification set.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Event Master exists with at least one participant whose Student Classification is null.
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the Event Master list view"
2. "Open the Event Master with the null-classification participant"
3. "Scroll to the Participant List section"
4. "Locate the participant with no Student Classification set"
5. "Read the Student Classification column value"
steps_result:
1. "Event Master list view loads"
2. "Event Master detail page opens"
3. "Participant List table is visible"
4. "The row for that participant is visible"
5. "The cell is blank — no dash, no N/A, no placeholder text"

title: [Renseikai] Student Classification Column – Activity Event Participant List – Student with Classification Value – Column visible with correct value
description: AC 01.1 — Regression Analysis — Confirms the Student Classification column appears in the Participant List when accessed from an Activity Event, not only from Event Master.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. An Activity Event (child event under an Event Master) exists with at least one participant whose Student Classification = 問合生 (inquiry).
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the parent Event Master and open a linked Activity Event"
2. "Scroll to the Participant List section"
3. "Locate the participant with Student Classification = 問合生"
4. "Read the Student Classification column value"
steps_result:
1. "Activity Event detail page opens"
2. "Participant List table is visible"
3. "Row for that participant is visible"
4. "The cell shows 問合生"

title: [Renseikai] Add Master Participant Filter – Student Classification – Filter Presence – Filter appears below Type filter
description: AC 02.1 — CRUD Testing — Confirms the Student Classification filter is visible in the Add Master Participant popup and positioned directly below the Type filter.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. An Event Master exists.
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the Event Master detail page"
2. "Click the Add Master Participant button"
3. "Observe the filter fields in the popup"
4. "Identify the position of the Student Classification filter relative to the Type filter"
steps_result:
1. "Event Master detail page opens"
2. "Add Master Participant popup opens"
3. "Filter section is visible"
4. "The Student Classification multi-select filter appears directly below the Type filter"

title: [Renseikai] Add Master Participant Filter – Student Classification – Default State – All students returned when no classification selected
description: AC 02.1 — Decision Table — Confirms that when no Student Classification filter value is selected, all students regardless of classification are returned.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Students exist with each classification: 在籍生, 元在籍生, 問合生, 季節講習生, and at least one with null.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Add Master Participant popup"
2. "Confirm the Student Classification filter shows no selected value"
3. "Click Search without selecting any classification"
steps_result:
1. "Popup opens with all filter fields empty"
2. "Student Classification filter is empty"
3. "Student list returns and includes students with all classification values (在籍生, 元在籍生, 問合生, 季節講習生, and null)"

title: [Renseikai] Add Master Participant Filter – Student Classification – Single Value Selected – Only matching students returned
description: AC 02.1 — Decision Table, Equivalence Partitioning — Confirms that selecting a single classification value returns only students with that classification.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. At least 2 students with 在籍生 exist. Students with other classifications also exist.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Add Master Participant popup"
2. "Click the Student Classification filter dropdown"
3. "Select 在籍生 from the dropdown"
4. "Click Search"
steps_result:
1. "Popup opens"
2. "Dropdown opens showing picklist values"
3. "在籍生 is selected and shown in the filter"
4. "Student list returns only students with Student Classification = 在籍生"

title: [Renseikai] Add Master Participant Filter – Student Classification – Two Values Selected – OR logic returns students of both types
description: AC 02.1 — Decision Table — Confirms that selecting two classification values returns students matching either value (OR logic).
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. At least 2 students with 在籍生, at least 2 with 問合生, and at least 2 with 元在籍生 exist.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Add Master Participant popup"
2. "Select 在籍生 in the Student Classification filter"
3. "Also select 問合生 in the same filter"
4. "Click Search"
steps_result:
1. "Popup opens"
2. "在籍生 is selected"
3. "Both 在籍生 and 問合生 are shown as selected"
4. "Student list contains students with 在籍生 AND students with 問合生; students with 元在籍生 or 季節講習生 are not included"

title: [Renseikai] Add Master Participant Filter – Student Classification – Picklist Dropdown – All defined values shown, no extras
description: AC 02.1 — Equivalence Partitioning — Confirms the filter dropdown shows exactly the 4 values defined in the Student Classification picklist field.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Student Classification picklist has exactly 4 values: 在籍生, 元在籍生, 問合生, 季節講習生.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Add Master Participant popup"
2. "Click the Student Classification filter to open its dropdown"
3. "Count and read all values in the dropdown"
steps_result:
1. "Popup opens"
2. "Dropdown opens and lists all available values"
3. "Exactly 4 values are shown: 在籍生, 元在籍生, 問合生, 季節講習生; no other values appear"

title: [Renseikai] Assign to Event Filter (from Event Master) – Student Classification – Filter Presence – Filter appears below Type filter
description: AC 02.2 — CRUD Testing — Confirms the Student Classification filter is visible in the Assign to Event popup opened from Event Master, positioned directly below the Type filter.

2. "Click Assign to Event to open the popup"

steps_result:

2. "Assign to Event popup opens"

4. "The Student Classification multi-select filter appears directly below the Type filter"

title: [Renseikai] Assign to Event Filter (from Event Master) – Student Classification – Single Value Selected – Only matching students returned
description: AC 02.2 — Decision Table — Confirms that selecting a single classification value in the Event Master Assign to Event popup returns only students with that classification.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Students with 季節講習生 and 在籍生 exist. Assign to Event popup open from Event Master.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Assign to Event popup from the Event Master detail page"
2. "Select 季節講習生 in the Student Classification filter"
3. "Click Search"
steps_result:
1. "Popup opens with filter fields empty"
2. "季節講習生 is selected"
3. "Student list shows only students with Student Classification = 季節講習生"

title: [Renseikai] Assign to Event Filter (from Activity Event) – Student Classification – Single Value Selected – Only matching students returned

preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Students with 在籍生, 問合生, and 元在籍生 exist. Assign to Event popup open from Activity Event.

title: [Renseikai] Student Classification Column – Collect Event Attendance – Student with Classification Value – Column visible with correct value

steps_result:

title: [Renseikai] Student Classification Column – Collect Event Attendance – Student with Null Classification – Column displays blank
description: AC 03.1 [dev-missed] — Negative Testing — Confirms the Student Classification column shows blank in Collect Event Attendance when the student has no classification set.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. An event has a Collect Event Attendance page with at least one participant whose Student Classification is null.
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the Collect Event Attendance page for the event"
2. "Locate the participant with no Student Classification set"
3. "Read the Student Classification column value"
steps_result:

2. "Row for that participant is visible"
3. "The cell is blank — no dash, no N/A"

title: [Renseikai] Student Classification Column – CSV Download Participants – Column present in file with correct value and blank for null
description: AC 03.2 [dev-missed] — CRUD Testing — Confirms the CSV download includes the Student Classification column with correct values and blank for null classification.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Event Master exists with 2 participants: Participant A (Student Classification = 在籍生) and Participant B (null classification).
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the Event Master detail page"
2. "Scroll to the Participant List section"
3. "Click the CSV Download button"
4. "Open the downloaded CSV file"
5. "Locate the Student Classification column header"
6. "Find the row for Participant A (在籍生)"
7. "Find the row for Participant B (null classification)"
steps_result:
1. "Event Master detail page opens"
2. "Participant List is visible"
3. "A CSV file is downloaded"
4. "CSV file opens with column headers in the first row"
5. "A column with the Student Classification header is present"
6. "The cell for Participant A shows 在籍生"
7. "The cell for Participant B is blank"
